**Severity:** Critical
**Affected versions:** phpVMS 7.x (up to 7.0.5)
**Fixed in:** v7.0.6
**Component:** Legacy importer

## Summary

A critical vulnerability in phpVMS 7.x allowed unauthenticated access to a legacy import feature. Although this feature is deprecated, parts of it remained accessible and operational.

## Impact

A remote attacker could trigger internal processes that modify or delete application data, potentially resulting in:

- Data loss
- Service disruption

No authentication was required.

## Remediation

- **Update immediately** to [the latest patched version](https://github.com/phpvms/phpvms/releases/tag/7.0.7)
- If unable to update:
  - The release link has instructions on how to fix it (it's a one-line fix to comment out the routes)

## Affected Versions

* Affected: phpVMS 7.x ≤ 7.0.5
* Not affected: phpVMS >= 7.0.6, v8 (feature removed from public access)", "epss": {"percentage": 0.01173, "percentile": 0.63535}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-fv26-4939-62fh", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-04T21:20:40Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-fv26-4939-62fh", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-fv26-4939-62fh"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-42569"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-09T20:16:29Z", "published_at": "2026-05-04T21:20:40Z", "references": ["https://github.com/phpvms/phpvms/security/advisories/GHSA-fv26-4939-62fh", "https://github.com/phpvms/phpvms/commit/f59ba8e0e8fc25c60c3faf14e526cfd49df3f7dc", "https://github.com/phpvms/phpvms/releases/tag/7.0.7", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-42569", "https://github.com/phpvms/phpvms/releases/tag/7.0.6", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-fv26-4939-62fh"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/phpvms/phpvms/security-advisories/GHSA-fv26-4939-62fh", "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/phpvms/phpvms", "summary": "phpVMS has an /importer authorization bypass causing full database wipe", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-13T13:42:26Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-fv26-4939-62fh", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "7.0.6", "package": {"ecosystem": "composer", "name": "nabeel/phpvms"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 7.0.6"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: phpVMS has an /importer authorization bypass causing full database wipe
